Name: Mewa
Description: Mewa was founded in 1908 and is one of the leading companies in the segment of textile management. In 2022, Mewa was voted again one of Germany’s brands of the century. The company currently serves about 200,000 companies from more than 47 locations Europe-wide and dresses their employees with suitable and protective workwear, supplies wipers, oil-trapping and dust-control mats or clean operations, helps to maintain hygienic washrooms and offers high-quality products for occupational safety as well as technical equipment. For more information please visit https://www.mewa-service.com/ or https://www.mewa.co.uk/.

Name: Call Your Dhobi
Description: Call your Dhobi is a new startup focused on meeting your day to day laundry needs. We understand that in this fast moving world, you have to manage life in all its spheres. Everyperson is muddling between work, family and household chores. And to be up to the mark everyday, clothing is one thing which also has to be trendy, maintained and impressive. Maintaining clothing to that level demands lot of care and time. We have gone through it and understand it completely.

Name: Quick Clean Laundry Solutions
Description:
Since 2010, Quick Clean has partnered with India’s leading hospitals and hotel groups to take full ownership of on-premise laundry operations at scale.

Today, we operate 110+ on-premise laundry sites across 38+ cities PAN India, processing over 80,000 kg of linen every single day through a fully owned and operated BOO-OPL model. Backed by a workforce of 1,500+ trained professionals, Quick Clean is India’s largest on-premise laundry operator and the country’s first ESCO-certified commercial laundry company.

We do not supply equipment. We run mission-critical laundry operations.

From infrastructure design and system commissioning to daily processing, infection-control compliance, manpower, maintenance, utilities, and SLA-linked performance management, we manage the entire laundry lifecycle.

Trusted by some of India’s most demanding brands, including Marriott, Taj, Hyatt, Radisson, ITC, IHG, Club Mahindra, and premier healthcare institutions such as AIIMS, Lilavati Hospital, PMCH Patna, and leading medical colleges across multiple states, Quick Clean operates in environments where failure is not an option.

Our technology-enabled operations provide real-time visibility through linen tracking, MIS dashboards, loss monitoring, and daily service reports. This ensures consistent hygiene, audit readiness, and operational uptime across every location.

Our high-efficiency processes deliver up to:

• 50% reduction in water usage
• 70% reduction in carbon emissions
• 30% reduction in chemical consumption

We are here to make your work life easier, more profitable, and truly sustainable.

Name: Oxwash | B Corp
Description:
Oxwash are a Certified B Corporation  
We exist to permanently eliminate the impact of washing on our planet and us 

Oxwash is revolutionising the washing industry. By uniquely combining next-generation cleaning and logistics platforms, Oxwash is closing the loop in inefficient processes in the growing on-demand hospitality and catering industries.

Name: Elis Danmark
Description:
Elis Danmark (Tidligere Berendsen Textile Service) tilbyder bæredygtige tekstil- og hygiejneløsninger og svanemærket vaskeriservice, hvor forbruget af vand, energi og vaskemidler ligger under Svanemærkets krav. Elis var én af de 10 første virksomheder i Danmark, der blev CSR-certificeret, og i 2019 blev Elis verdensmålcertificeret af Bureau Veritas som den første virksomhed i verden. Elis er en del af en international multiservice-leverandør, der tilbyder løsninger indenfor tekstil-, hygiejne- og facility services.

Elis er til stede i Europa og Latinamerika og er førende i de fleste af de 28 lande, hvor virksomheden har aktiviteter. Koncernen har 45.000 medarbejdere i 440 produktions- og servicecentre og arbejder for den offentlige sektor og private virksomheder i alle størrelser og på tværs af alle brancher. Koncernen tilbyder skræddersyede løsninger indenfor fladt linned, arbejdstøj, toiletmiljøer, måtter, drikkevarer, renrum, skadedyrsbekæmpelse og medicinsk affaldshåndtering. Læs mere på: www.corporate-elis.com/en 

Bemærk: Vores LinkedIn-side er ikke en kundeservice-side. Hvis du er kunde hos os nu og har brug for hjælp i hverdagen, så kontakt din lokale serviceafdeling, som du finder på https://dk.elis.com/da/kontakt.

Name: ETSA - European Textile Services Association
Description:
ETSA is the European Textile Services Association. We represent and promote the textile rental services sector in Europe.

Our aims include regulatory affairs; promote best industry practices; research demonstrating the benefits of textile services; platform for exchanges between industry professionals from members firms and national associations. 

Let's work together to make more people aware of how textile services contribute to a more circular economy!

Name: Textilia Danmark
Description:
Som markedsledende servicevirksomhed inden for tekstil totalløsninger, støtter vi jer med specialiseret rådgivning, innovative løsninger og pålidelig service. Med os som leverandør har I mulighed for at samle en lang række serviceydelser ét sted. I får en samarbejdspartner med stor specialviden om de behov, den sikkerhed og de krav, forskellige brancher stiller. Vi skræddersyr en løsning nøjagtig til jeres behov, hvor I får det præcist, som I ønsker. 

Som total tekstilleverandør tilbyder vi følgende serviceydelser:

•	Beklædning og sko
•	Linned
•	Dækketøj
•	Måtter
•	Hygiejne
•	Værnemidler
•	Beklædningsskabe 
•	TexMatic
•	Viima Rengøringssystem

MILJØHENSYN MED HOLDNING
118 millioner stykker vasketøj cirkulerer årligt gennem vores vaskerier, og vi har en million leverancer i Danmark pr. år. Vask og logistik er i sagens natur miljøbelastende, og derfor bærer vi hos Texilia et særligt ansvar. Der er både holdning og handling bag miljøhensyn, og vores forretningsgrundlag bygger på genbrug af tekstiler. Vi tager ansvaret meget seriøst, og undersøger hele tiden nye veje for forbedringer. For hvert år falder vores energiforbrug på trods af øget produktion, fordi vi optimerer på vand- og energiforbrug samt logistik. Alle vores afdelinger er miljøcertificerede efter ISO 14001.

Name: SALESIANER Gruppe
Description:
Die SALESIANER Gruppe ist ein österreichisches Familienunternehmen und bietet seit über 100 Jahren höchste Qualität bei Wäschedienstleistungen und Miettextilien. Dank unserer Innovationskraft sowie unserem klaren Bekenntnis zu Nachhaltigkeit, Hygiene und Gesundheit sind wir Marktführer in der Region Österreich, Zentral-, Süd- und Osteuropa.

Unser Kerngeschäft ist die textile Vollversorgung für das Gesundheitswesen, Hotellerie und Gastronomie, Industrie und Gewerbe mit Mietwäsche. Reinraumtextilien, Waschraum- hygiene sowie Werbe- und Schmutzfangmatten ergänzen unser Angebot. 

The SALESIANER Group is an Austrian family-owned company which has been offering top quality textile service and textile rental services for over 100 years. The strength of our innovative approach together with our clear commitment to sustainability, hygiene and health have enabled us to become the market leader in the regions of Austria, Central, Southern and Eastern Europe.

The core business of our company is to meet all the textile needs of the healthcare sector, hotels and restaurants, industry and commerce. We also offer cleanroom textiles, washroom hygiene products, dust control and graphic maps.

Name: Elis Sverige (Sweden)
Description:
Elis, en internationell multi-serviceleverantör, erbjuder lösningar inom textilier, hygienartiklar och facility services. Vi finns i Europa och Latinamerika och är marknadsledande i majoriteten av länderna där vi har verksamhet. 45 000 personer är anställda på 440 produktions- och servicecenter i 29 länder. Vi arbetar för offentliga och privata organisationer av alla storlekar och inom alla sektorer. 

I Sverige erbjuder vi skräddarsydda lösningar inom arbetskläder, bädd- och badlinne, hälso- och sjukvård, renrum, mattor och hygienartiklar.  

Hos oss på Elis är miljöarbetet en viktig del av vårt dagliga arbete. Vår absoluta ambition är att producera energisnålt, förbättra vår miljöprestanda, använda etiska affärsmetoder och ställa miljökrav på våra leverantörer. Många av våra anläggningar är dessutom Svanenmärkta. 

Vill du växa med oss? Vi satsar ständigt framåt och söker alltid efter ambitiösa och drivna medarbetare som tex, säljare och kundservicemedarbetare. Hos oss finns intressanta utmaningar och stora möjligheter till personlig utveckling. Vi är också mycket stolta över vårt unika, individanpassade och utvecklade Mangement Traineeprogram. Programmet vänder sig till drivna nyexaminerade civilingenjörer eller -ekonomer med en ambition att kickstarta sin ledarskapskarriär. Programmet, som pågår under två år, omfattar fyra projekt, varav ett genomförs utomlands.


Elis är listat på Euronext Paris. För mer information, besök http://www.berendsen.se

Name: Textilia Sverige
Description:
Tvätt-och textilservice för dig med höga krav på hållbarhet, service, kvalitet och hygien.

Vi är en rikstäckande tvätt- och textilservicepartner med tvätterier över hela landet – från Boden i norr till Malmö i söder. Vårt huvudkontor ligger i Örebro.

Med Textilia blir våra kunders vardag enklare. Vi ser till att de alltid har rena och hela textilier av hög kvalitet – på rätt ställe, i rätt mängd, i rätt tid.

Vi skapar en renare morgondag.

Med engagemang, nytänkande och affärsfokus strävar vi alltid efter att hitta den allra bästa lösningen för varje enskild kund. Framför allt strävar vi efter att tillsammans med våra kunder hitta de mest hållbara lösningarna. 

Vi kan inte längre kompromissa med klimatet – att skapa en renare morgondag är vår mission och vårt allra viktigaste uppdrag.

En förebild inom hållbart företagande.

Vi ser till att hela processen – hela kedjan från tillverkning av textilier till vattenförbrukning, elförbrukning och transporter – orsakar så liten miljöpåverkan som möjligt.

Och vårt miljöarbete sträcker sig längre än textilierna. Vår vision är att vara en förebild inom hållbart företagande på alla sätt. Att ta ansvar för både miljö och människor.

Unna dig en enklare vardag. Unna dig Textilia.

Name: Sudsies Dry Cleaning

Whether you're a fashion brand, a boutique hotel, or a discerning individual, Sudsies delivers on care, confidentiality, and consistency.

Looking to partner or grow with us?

Feel free to reach out at info@sudsies.com or simply drop us a message right here on our LinkedIn Page.

Name: Tintorería y Lavandería Aspen
Description:
Operando en el negocio de tintorerías desde el año de 1975, los accionistas decidieron crear ASPEN (Tintorería y Lavandería Industrial Acuario, S.A. de C.V.) unos años después, quedando legalmente constituida el 13 de diciembre de 1979. Lo anterior, con el objeto de proporcionar principalmente a empresas, un servicio de alta calidad en el lavado de toda clase de prendas, tales como: pieles, camisas, cortinas, peluches, botargas, trajes, mantelería, uniformes, etc.; lavados en seco, en agua, o con el novedoso sistema de lavado “Wet Cleaning” y aprovechando siempre los mejores productos de limpieza del mercado. 

Atendemos a clientes de diversas industrias, como alimenticia, químico-farmacéutica, instituciones bancarias y muchas otras más, procesando entre 125,000 y 150,000 prendas cada mes. Esto equivale en promedio, a poco más de dos toneladas de ropa por día, de las cuales el 80% se entrega en un máximo de 24 horas a solicitud de nuestros clientes, logrando importantes índices de puntualidad arriba del 90%.

Somos una empresa comprometida con la ecología, por lo que contamos con modernos equipos, dentro de los que destacamos máquinas lavadoras de seco de circuito cerrado, máquinas lavadoras de agua de bajo consumo con dosificadores de productos químicos automáticos, planta para reusar el agua, entre otros. Para la entrega de sus prendas, cuando así lo requieren, utilizamos bolsas ox biodegradables y contamos con un programa de reúso de ganchos.

Atendiendo a la salud de nuestros clientes, no podemos lavar ropa de hospitales, ropa de guarderías, ropa que utilicen para la fabricación de productos betalactámicos, cefalosporínicos, hormonales, inmunosupresores, oncológicos y hemoderivados.

Description:
Notre entreprise propose des services de blanchisserie tout en œuvrant à l'insertion socioprofessionnelle des personnes en situation de handicap ou éloignées du marché ordinaire du travail.

Name: Al Phillips Cleaners
Description:
Al Phillips Cleaners is the current iteration of the iconic Al Phillips the Cleaner brand: one of the oldest and best-known service brands in Las Vegas, and a worldwide legend in the dry cleaning, laundry, and garment care industry. We're one of the largest cleaners in the United States, and the largest in the State of Nevada, fulfilling eco-friendly dry cleaning, laundry service, and alterations needs for both individuals and business accounts.

Our history dates back over 60 years to the Golden Age of Las Vegas, and we pioneered for the industry concepts like drive-thrus and 24-hour service. Our stores were frequented by celebrities including Elvis Presley, Frank Sinatra, Jimmy Durante, Sammy Davis Jr., and more. By the 1970’s and stretching into the 1980’s, Al Phillips the Cleaner was regarded as the busiest dry cleaner in the world.

Though the brand has changed hands over the years, we retain the legacy, history, and commitment to service that goes all the way back to the Golden Age of Las Vegas. After the 2023 acquisition by Timeless Cleaners, Inc., in the spirit of the original industry innovations pioneered at Al Phillips the Cleaner, we began to introduce next-generation technologies to elevate the customer experience and upgrade our operations, leading the industry into the next generation.

Through our brand portfolio we serve Clark County and the Greater Las Vegas area including Henderson, North Las Vegas, and Boulder City. 

Drop off at one of our many stores or our centrally-located processing plant, or arrange free pickup & delivery at your home or office!

Name: Spira utvikling AS
Description:
Spira utvikling er eit tilbud i NAV sin tiltakskjede og er eigd av Vindafjord kommune og Etne kommune. Me er ca 50 personar på Spira utvikling, og ein arbeidsplass med mange muligheter.

Spira utvikling tilbyr varig tilrettelagt arbeid (VTA), arbeidsførebuande trening (AFT), samt kommunalt tilrettelagt aktivitet i inkluderende arbeidsmarknadsbedrift (KTA). Hos oss har me 24 fulle VTA-plassar, 6 AFT-plassar og KTA-plassar etter behov i våre to eigarkommunar.

Me har yrker og oppgåver innan vaskeri, hjelpemidler, reinhald, transport/ logistikk, kjøkken/ kantine, merkantil, makulering, trearbeid, og sist men ikkje minst vårt unike lysstøyperi Litledalen Lys.

Me tilbyr interne kurs for alle ansatte, samt årleg julebord og sommarfest. I kantina tilbyr me sunn og næringsrik lunsj kvar tirsdag og fredag, og kantina vårer eit sosialt treffpunkt i løpet av dagen.

Våre overordna verdiar er Trygghet, Raushet og Utvikling (TRU) og her skal ein trygg arbeidsplass med stor takhøgde og gode utviklingsmuligheter vere standarden. Me har TRUa på kvart enkelt menneske.

Description:

Située sur la commune du Port (97420), 11 salariés oeuvrent chaque jour pour assurer l'entretien du linge,  indispensable au bon fonctionnement de l'activité de nos clients professionnels.
Les domaines sont variés et notre expertise large : médical, santé, hôtellerie, site religieux, industrie...

Ouvert 7J/7 et jours fériés,  nous sommes seuls à assurer ce service personnalisé sur l'île de la Réunion. Nos clients disposent d'une continuité de service sur-mesure.
La société dispose de la certification ISO 9001 depuis 2015.

Les services proposés sont : ramassage,  lavage, séchage, pliage, repassage et livraison. Nos plus, une entreprise à taille humaine avec un équilibre entre machine et ressources humaines pour personnaliser votre prestation. Le savoir faire de nos équipes pour entretenir et réparer vos textiles.

Les principaux textiles sont les draps, les taies, les couvertures, les serviettes, les serpillères, les uniformes (blouses, jean, polo, tee-shirt). 

Alors, libérez vous du temps et confiez-nous votre textile. Ils sont entre de bonnes mains !

Name: MEGHA   Industrial laundry ( #ISO Certified )
Description:
MEGHA Linen & Workwear , ISO CERTIFIED COMPANY is an leading provider of LAUNDRY SERVICES to Hotels ,Restaurant, Catering, Food manufacturing, Automotive Engineering & Pharmaceuticals Industries by knowing the importance of Washing the technical garments after use. 
We are specialist laundry service company. We only clean functional textiles - textiles that are comprised of multiple technical layers and therefore require highly specialized and sophisticated washing and chemical impregnation processes. So ,we are different to normal laundry services. Which typically do only very little technical & PPE work .
Mixing of workwear & personal laundry can lead to contamination & illness, germs can survive up to 21 days on home washed garments. The technical garments are put into use in various tough conditions in the field . They are to be washed properly before next use, which eliminates the risk of skin allergy due to fungus & bacterias which are developed by sweat in course of usage. The proper maintenance of garments with periodical washing with appropriate chemical increases the life of the garments & extends the comfort to users . With our processes , PPE easily lasts twice as long ,which represents reduction in PPE total life cycle costs.
So apart from cleaning, reparing is a part of process.When garments are found to be damaged like Zipper, Buttons, Velcro, Tapes and base stitching.

INDUSTRIES WE WORK -: 
 Pharma, Food, Healthcare, Hotels & Restaurants, Electronic , Automobile Engineering, Retail

             3)   Wash care & Repair, Maintenance of workwear
             4) Workwear locker services
              5)Floor protection Mats

Name: Cleanline Linen Management Pvt. Ltd
Description:
Sri Lanka has been lauded as one of the most popular destinations for global tourism by several renowned platforms such as Lonely Planet. Better transport links, new hotels and a growing number of activities were cited as the reason why our country was chosen for the top spot in the guidebook publisher’s annual ‘Best in Travel’ awards.

In order to support the growing number of hotels and increasing standards, Cleanline Linen Management Pvt. Ltd. was incorporated in 2015, as a crucial support service that improved an otherwise unorganized laundry industry in Sri Lanka whilst mitigating increasing utility, human resource and technical process costs.

Funded by internationally recognized institutions such as IFC, DEG and FMO through Emerald Fund, Cleanline established Sri Lanka’s first commercial laundry that is up to international hospitality standards. This was achieved thanks to the knowledge transfer in design, commissioning and operations from Zero Spot Laundry – which is the largest central laundry in Singapore processing over 150,000 kg/day.

Together with this collective experience and expertise, Cleanline has constructed an unparalleled Facility to deliver a complete laundry solution that is environmentally conscious and technologically advanced to ensure superior quality and longer linen lifetimes.

Name: SUDS PREMIER FRANCHISING CORP
Description:
Suds Clothing Care Group:
Laundry and Dry Cleaning chemicals. Industrial Laundry. Retail Laundry. Dry Cleaning. Wet Cleaning. Franchising.

WHO WE ARE:
The Suds Group is a 20-year old company with retail and industrial laundry presence. We are pioneers in wet cleaning through our brand Reviva Luxury Garment Care and our partnership with the inventors of the method, Kreussler & Co. GmbH of Germany. 

Our industrial laundry, Aquion, serves both hotels and hospital clients and has presence in Cabuyao, Laguna and Silang, Cavite.

ESTABLISHED IN 2003
Starting out as a retail laundry store in Dasmarinas, Cavite, Suds has now grown as one of the biggest names in the Philippine laundry industry and is now part of the First Asia Venture Capital Inc. group of companies.

Suds proudly distributes Kreussler chemicals from Germany. A leader in laundry chemical innovation, especially its invention of the wet cleaning process. It is able to replace dry cleaning by using just water and special chemicals to clean dry-clean only fabrics.

Suds started in retail laundry in 2003. Through franchising, we are now one of the largest laundry and dry cleaning/ wet cleaning names with a nationwide presence with 48 stores and counting.

Our Suds Go Cleaners store concept uses internet-connected, industrial-grade washers and dryers.

Suds' subsidiary, Aquion Inc., is our industrial laundry arm serving clients such as Makati Medical Center, Nestle Philippines, and many more.

Aquion is currently building a continuous batch washer (tunnel) system in Silang, Cavite. Our Silang facility will have two tunnel systems to serve both hospital and non-hospital clients separately.

Our high-hygiene line, which caters to food clients, will be served in our Cabuyao, Laguna plant.

Suds' brand, Reviva Luxury Garment Care, is one of the pioneering wet cleaning service brands in the country. Trained by Kreussler, Reviva seeks to educate discerning individuals on the merits of sustainable garment cleaning.

Name: Pressed In Time UK
Description:
Pressed In Time is a leading laundry and dry cleaning franchise brand. Our success story started in South Africa, where we are currently the only laundry and dry cleaning franchise network operating, with over 80 outlets. Pressed In Time has now reached the shores of the United Kingdom and Ireland, and looking to expand its franchise business here, so get in touch with us if you are interested.

WHY PRESSED IN TIME?
As a company on the cutting-edge, our vision is to use the best technology in every Pressed In Time store, delivering the highest quality service at the most affordable price, to as many people as possible.

We achieve this by investing in the training and development of our store owners and staff and, importantly, through the great service we provide.

Laundry is here to stay, and so is Pressed In Time.
For as long as people need to get their laundry clean, there will be a need for our service.

Our solid expansion is a result of us identifying a real consumer need and satisfying it in a friendly, efficient and professional way for families, couples and those who live alone, together with many companies who have come to trust and rely on Pressed In Time.

For good reason, we are highly selective of who becomes a Pressed In Time franchisee, as we want to work with only the very best. To those who meet our criteria, we offer a highly successful business opportunity with a track record that is both proven and ready for substantial growth.

Name: LAVERIE EXPRESS
Description:
LAVERIE EXPRESS, votre blanchisserie professionnelle, est là pour prendre en charge tout votre linge, que vous soyez un professionnel ou un particulier. Nous nous occupons de la collecte, du lavage, du séchage, du repassage et enfin de la livraison de votre linge chez vous.

Notre service de blanchisserie professionnelle est conçu pour répondre à tous vos besoins en matière de nettoyage du linge. Que vous soyez un hôtel, un restaurant, une entreprise ou un particulier, nous sommes là pour vous aider à garder votre linge propre et frais.

Pour les professionnels, nous offrons un service de collecte régulière de votre linge sale. Notre équipe viendra chercher votre linge à des intervalles convenus, et nous le ramènerons propre et bien repassé selon vos spécifications. Cela vous permet de vous concentrer sur votre activité principale tout en ayant l'assurance que votre linge sera toujours impeccable.

Pour les particuliers, nous proposons un service de collecte et de livraison à domicile. Vous n'avez plus besoin de perdre du temps à faire la lessive. Il vous suffit de nous contacter, et nous viendrons chercher votre linge sale à votre domicile. Une fois propre et repassé, nous vous le ramènerons à l'adresse de votre choix.

Nous utilisons des équipements et des produits de haute qualité pour assurer un nettoyage optimal de votre linge tout en préservant sa qualité et sa durabilité. Que ce soit pour des vêtements, du linge de maison, des nappes ou des uniformes, nous traitons chaque pièce avec le plus grand soin.

En confiant votre linge à LAVERIE EXPRESS, vous avez l'assurance de bénéficier d'un service fiable, efficace et personnalisé. Nous comprenons l'importance d'avoir du linge propre et bien entretenu, c'est pourquoi nous mettons tout en œuvre pour vous offrir une expérience de blanchisserie sans souci.

N'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour en savoir plus sur nos services ou pour mettre en place un partenariat avec notre blanchisserie professionnelle.

Description:
Cleanlzy Gauthier est le 1er Franchisé de l'enseigne CLEANZY – pressing écologique de haute qualité.

Name: Safety Solutions for Healthcare
Description:
SSH provides research-driven consulting services to healthcare linen facilities nationwide. Our approach is specifically focused on claims mitigation for maximum impact to your organization’s bottom line.  At SSH, we take safety seriously.  We build a comprehensive safety program for each healthcare linen facility where we draw from our five pillars:  Training; Awareness; Compliance; Claims Management; Measurement.  

With over 20 years of experience in Safety, 14 years experience in Risk Management, and 11 years experience in the linen industry, it's easy to see we have safety and risk covered.  

Do you need help?  Here are some tips you may be in trouble and need our assistance:

1.  Check your Experience Modification Rate.  If you are above 1.0 and/or trending upward, you need us.  This rating determines your insurance premiums.  The higher above 1.0, the higher the premiums.
2.  Check your Total Recordable Incident Rate.  According to the BLS, the linen industry average is 3.2%.  If you are above the average and/or trending upward, you need our assistance.
3.   Is your safety training and awareness program effective?  Does it align with  your business needs?  If not addressing the needs of your business, it could result in an injury and possibly a law suite.  We can help!
4.  Are you measuring your performance?  Do you have a safety and risk dashboard?  Is it reviewed monthly with leadership?  We provide a dashboard tailored to your business and we review it monthly with leadership.
5.  Who monitors your Loss Run Report from your insurance carrier?  How often do you have claim review calls with your insurance carrier?  Asking the right questions to your carrier?  We can help.  We closely monitor your loss run and work with insurance companies to try and get claims closed as quickly as possible.  The result, savings to your bottom line.

Our most important focus...."Prevention"!

Name: Wrexham Workwear Ltd
Description:
At Wrexham Workwear we are committed to providing a premium laundered workwear service that prioritizes short lead times and good quality laundered clothing 

 

Although Wrexham Workwear is a new company, we have a team of experts that have a combined experience of over 30 years.

 

During these years we have seen a need for better quality laundered workwear, time and time again we have heard stories of companies being unhappy with their current suppliers.

 

Whether it’s the lead times, garments coming back dirty or just having poor customer service people seem to not be happy with what there is currently on offer. 

 

Our solution is a tailored and attentive service that guarantees you are happy with your uniforms, there's nothing worse than kitting out your staff in new uniform for it all to come back next week from the laundrette still dirty and creased or worse they have shrunk them!  

 

We offer all customers a sizing sample pack, we prewash this pack to accommodate the 5% shrinkage that all garments have after the first wash. 

 

Doing this means that after we have washed the garments for you, they will still fit perfectly. 

 

These sizing packs are then yours to keep, so whenever you have anew starter, they can try on all the garments to ensure they fit correctly. 

 

Then once receiving your order we will send it out to you in 5-7 working days, rather than weeks! 

At Wrexham Workwear we know that you want a quick, attentive, and stress-free experience when it comes to uniforms which is exactly what we aim to do 
 
Garment relabeling is a great way to brand your own apparel. Removing the existing neck label from a T-shirt, Polo, Hoodie, or Shirt and replacing it with your own private, or corporate clients label immediately changes the perception of your merchandise, from a stock garment to a bespoke garment.
Once the old label has been removed, we can add any label style to suit your specific requirements. Simply get in touch!

Name: OXXO Cleaners that Care
Description:
Welcome to OXXO Cleaners that Care, where innovation meets eco-consciousness, and every garment is treated with the utmost care and attention. 

At OXXO, we are more than just a dry-cleaning service; we are a reflection of our commitment to the environment, our communities, and the well-being of our valued customers. Here's what defines us:

Sustainability at Heart: We prioritize the health of our planet by utilizing cutting-edge, eco-friendly cleaning technology and processes. From using GreenEarth solvents to our energy-efficient equipment, we're dedicated to reducing our environmental footprint.

Community Engagement: We believe in giving back to the communities we serve. OXXO Cleaners that Care actively participates in local initiatives and supports charitable causes that make a positive impact on the lives of our neighbors.

Innovation Redefined: We're constantly pushing the boundaries of dry-cleaning convenience. Our 24/7 automated kiosks and drop off boxes offer a hassle-free drop-off and pick-up experience, and our tech-driven approach ensures your garments receive the best care possible.

Care Beyond Clean: Your garments aren't just clothes; they are a part of your life's story. We treat each piece as if it were our own, ensuring they return to you impeccably clean, hand pressed, fresh, and ready to impress.

Convenience is Key: With our OXXO App dry-cleaning is a few clicks away.  Schedule your pick-up and delivery on our app.  Take the ‘busy’ out of our schedule and let us do all the work!

We also provide alterations, wash and fold, bridal dress alterations, cleaning, preservation, shoe cleaning and repair, household item cleaning, pet bed and toy cleaning, bedding and linen cleaning, and specialty item cleaning and preservation. 

Follow us on LinkedIn to stay connected, informed, and inspired.  Experience the OXXO difference today by visiting our website oxxousa.com and discover how we're making a positive impact, one clean garment at a time.

Name: Textilreinigung und Wäscherei Bashota
Description: Unsere Reinigungsdienste sind auf höchste Qualität und Kundenzufriedenheit ausgerichtet. Wir verstehen, dass jedes Kleidungsstück und jede Textilie einzigartig ist und individuelle Pflege benötigt, um in bestmöglichem Zustand zu bleiben. Wir haben jahrelange Erfahrung in der Textilpflege und verwenden nur die modernsten Technologien und Reinigungsmethoden, um die Qualität Ihrer Kleidungsstücke und Heimtextilien zu erhalten. Wir bieten einen schnellen und zuverlässigen Service, der auf Ihre Bedürfnisse abgestimmt ist. Egal, ob es sich um eine Standardreinigung oder eine spezielle Fleckenentfernung handelt, wir sind stets bemüht, Ihnen den bestmöglichen Service zu bieten. Wir verwenden nur umweltfreundliche Reinigungsmethoden und -Produkte, um die Umweltbelastung so gering wie möglich zu halten. Ein weiterer Vorteil, den unsere Kunden schätzen, ist unser bequemer Abhol- und Lieferservice. Wir holen Ihre Kleidungsstücke und Heimtextilien direkt bei Ihnen zu Hause oder im Büro ab und liefern sie innerhalb kürzester Zeit wieder zurück. Dies ermöglicht es Ihnen, Zeit und Mühe zu sparen, die Sie für wichtigere Dinge nutzen können. Unser Ziel ist es, unseren Kunden den bestmöglichen Service zu bieten und ihre Erwartungen zu übertreffen. Wir verstehen, dass Ihre Kleidungsstücke und Heimtextilien wertvoll sind und wir behandeln sie entsprechend. Wir sind stolz darauf, einen personalisierten Service anzubieten, der auf Ihre individuellen Bedürfnisse abgestimmt ist und eine hohe Kundenzufriedenheit garantiert. Insgesamt bietet unser Reinigungsdienst eine zuverlässige, hochwertige und bequeme Lösung für die Pflege Ihrer Kleidungsstücke und Heimtextilien. Wir laden Sie herzlich ein, uns zu kontaktieren und von unseren Dienstleistungen zu profitieren.

Name: Crisbi Clean
Description:
CRISBI CLEAN
Spalatoria-curatatoria Crisbi Clean s-a infiintat in anul 1999, noi avem ca obiectiv principal sa oferim servicii de calitate de care toti avem nevoie: curatarea si spalarea obiectelor textile si din blana naturala; curatarea obiectelor cu puf (perne ; pilote) si a covoarelor. Din anul 1999 ne dezvoltam si ne perfectionam din toate punctele de vedere pentru a ne multumii clientii. Ne-am dezvoltat in mai multe domenii la cererea clientului, asa ca astazi spalatoria Crisbi Clean va ofera serviciile noastre in mai multe domenii:

- spalatorie/ curatatorie
- Croitorie/ retus haine
- igienizarea si curatarea pernelor de puf
- curatarea si spalarea covoarelor
- vopsitorie obiecte textile si piele
- curatarea incaltamintei si a gentilor
CRISBI CLEAN mai colaboreaza foarte bine cu importanti clienti din zona afacerilor, industria alimentara (fabrici de mezeluri, fabrici de lactate, fabrici de inghetata, etc.), hoteluri, restaurante, industria produselor farmaceutice, service-uri auto, firme organizatoare de evenimente, sali de fitness, Spa-uri, saloane de coafura, diverse ambasade si importante personalitati publice si mass-media, colaborari ce au la baza promptitudinea si calitatea serviciilor.

In acest moment functionam in mai multe centre din Bucuresti cu un personal calificat si cu experienta in domeniu, cu utilaje si echipamente profesionale de mare capacitate si de ultima generatie ( Electrolux, Renzacci, Ipso, Kaan, Miele)

COVOARE SI MOCHETE
Covorul adună în fibrele sale praf, acarieni, microorganisme, fire de păr, resturi de mâncare. Dacă nu este curăţat, covorul poate fi o adevărată sursă de îmbolnăviri. Spălătoria Crisbi Clean efectuează curăţarea şi spălarea covoarelor, mochetelor şi a preşurilor textile cu utilaje de mari dimensiuni şi angajaţi instruiţi special pentru această operaţiune încât covorul dumneavoastră să fie curat şi reîmprospătat. 

Pentru comenzi la domiciliu sunaţi la numărul de telefon: 0757119611

Name: Mexiwash BR
Description:
Mexiwash es una empresa innovadora especializada en el segmento de lavanderías de autoservicio, ofreciendo modelos de negocio tanto con franquicia como sin franquicia. Nuestro propósito es claro: ayudar a las personas a tener su propio negocio altamente rentable, moderno y fácil de gestionar.

A través de nuestras marcas Lavajato y LSF (Lavandería Sin Franquicia), trajimos a México el modelo que ya transformó la vida de miles de emprendedores en Brasil, consolidando un sector en constante crecimiento.

Nos enfocamos en la creación de lavanderías pequeñas, eficientes y con gran rentabilidad, eliminando la necesidad de empleados fijos y asegurando una operación simple y totalmente automatizada. Gracias a nuestra tecnología, los propietarios pueden controlar su negocio en la palma de la mano, directamente desde el celular, con datos en tiempo real y una gestión inteligente.

Nuestro diferencial está en combinar experiencia internacional, innovación tecnológica y conocimiento estratégico, adaptando lo mejor de Brasil y México para crear oportunidades accesibles y escalables.

En Mexiwash creemos que emprender debe ser una experiencia práctica y gratificante. Por eso, además de equipos de alta calidad y sistemas de automatización, ofrecemos consultoría estratégica, acompañamiento y soporte, para que cada socio o cliente tenga todo lo necesario para crecer con seguridad y confianza.

Ya sea mediante un modelo franquiciado o a través de nuestro sistema sin franquicia (LSF), estamos comprometidos con impulsar el éxito de cada proyecto. Nuestra misión es democratizar el acceso a negocios rentables, transformando la manera en que se conciben y operan las lavanderías de autoservicio en México y América Latina.

Name: Pralnia Samoobsługowa Renzacci Laundromat Białystok
Description:
Pralnia samoobsługowa klasy premium – dla wymagających klientów indywidualnych i biznesu.

W świecie, w którym czas to najcenniejszy zasób, stworzyliśmy miejsce, które łączy efektywność, wygodę i najwyższą jakość usług pralniczych. Nasza pralnia samoobsługowa to nowoczesna przestrzeń stworzona z myślą o osobach aktywnych zawodowo, które cenią sobie porządek, higienę i oszczędność czasu.

Korzystamy z profesjonalnych urządzeń przemysłowych marki Renzacci – tej samej klasy sprzętu, z którego korzystają najlepsze hotele na świecie. Dzięki temu możemy zaoferować głębokie czyszczenie, szybkie cykle prania i suszenia, a przede wszystkim – gwarancję jakości.

Co nas wyróżnia?

Regularna sterylizacja maszyn i dbałość o czystość w całym obiekcie – bo wiemy, że higiena to podstawa zaufania.

Systemy bezdotykowej płatności (karta, telefon,), łatwa obsługa maszyn i szybki proces.

Duży, bezpieczny parking tuż przy wejściu

Monitoring HD i automatyczny system dostępu – komfort i bezpieczeństwo naszych klientów są priorytetem.

Elastyczność – możesz samodzielnie zrealizować cały proces w mniej niż godzinę.


Nasza pralnia to idealne rozwiązanie zarówno dla osób prywatnych, które chcą zadbać o swoją garderobę w szybki i wygodny sposób, jak i dla firm, które potrzebują profesjonalnego i bezobsługowego wsparcia w zakresie prania odzieży, pościeli czy tekstyliów.

Zapraszamy do miejsca, które redefiniuje pojęcie pralni. Dla tych, którzy chcą więcej niż czyste ubrania – chcą doświadczenia, które dorównuje ich standardom.

Name: Splash Sneakers
Description:
A Splash Sneakers surgiu em 2017, quando Isac, ainda no ensino médio, começou a oferecer serviços de limpeza de tênis para colegas de escola, transformando um cuidado pessoal em um negócio promissor. Em 2020, ingressou como auxiliar de lavanderia na Alfa Sneakers, onde permaneceu até 2023, adquirindo experiência técnica e estratégica no setor.

O reconhecimento veio ainda naquele ano: em fevereiro de 2023, a Splash Sneakers foi destaque na Revista GQ Brasil – Edição 132 (capa Felipe Andreoli), reforçando sua autoridade como referência nacional em cuidado e restauração de tênis.

Em 2024, Isac se uniu a Hyago, amigo de escola com quem estudou e se conheceu no bairro do Tatuapé. Compartilhando os mesmos valores e o desejo de empreender com autenticidade, fundaram juntos a primeira loja física da Splash Sneakers, no mesmo bairro onde a amizade começou.

Com foco em cuidado artesanal, excelência técnica e atendimento próximo, a empresa quadruplicou de tamanho e segue em plena expansão no mercado brasileiro.

If you regularly rent out an Airbnb or VRBO property, you might find it overwhelming to keep up with laundry between guests. If you are a hotel or motel, then not only are you constantly preparing fresh linens and towels between guests, but you are probably also wearing down your own machines. Perhaps you manage the laundry needs for a hospital or medical office and are finding it difficult to keep up with patient robes, towels, and bed linens. Tumble & Dry has the solution for you. We can take your dirty laundry off your hands. We have expert launderers who will wash, dry, and fold everything. We take the wash & fold process seriously. We use high-quality detergents, softeners, and dryer sheets to get your laundry clean and fresh. Give your patrons an experience accentuated with clean, fresh linens and more.

Luna GIL – Lavanderia Industriale & Global Solution per Hotellerie e Ristorazione
 Roma, Via MicheleMigliarini, 62 | +39067233393 | info@lavanderialunagil.it

Da oltre 20 anni, LunaGIL è partner di riferimento per strutture alberghiere, ristoranti, B&B e case vacanza a Roma e provincia, offrendo una soluzione globale per la gestione della biancheria e del tovagliato.

 Cosa offriamo
- Noleggio e lavaggio biancheria: tovaglie, tovaglioli, runner, gonne buffet, lenzuola, asciugamani e molto altro, con processi strutturati per garantire alta qualità e sicurezza igienica.
- Lavaggio industriale ecosostenibile: ciclo a bassa temperatura (40°C), pH neutro con enzimi, ridotto consumo energetico e monitoraggio rigoroso del processo.
-Tracciabilità totale del ciclo: sistema automatizzato di etichettatura e tracking per garantire la perfetta corrispondenza fra i capi ritirati e quelli consegnati.
- Logistica personalizzata: consegna e ritiro pianificati secondo le esigenze del cliente, anche in ZTL, utilizzando rolls e sacchi, con possibilità di reintegrare capi usurati.

 I nostri punti di forza
- Professionalità certificata: personale formato sul settore hospitality e attrezzature di ultima generazione.
- Efficienza e puntualità: gestione integrata pensata per alleggerire il lavoro interno delle strutture, lasciando ai clienti la cura dei propri ospiti.
- Risparmio economico: eliminazione dei costi di acquisto, sostituzione, gestione e trasporto della biancheria, con possibilità di calcolare costi fissi certi per camera.
- Qualità garantita: tessuti selezionati e sottoposti a rigorosi controlli per durata e integrità.

 Perché sceglierci
Scegliere LunaGIL significa affidarsi a un partner affidabile, capace di offrire un servizio chiavi in mano, con trasparenza, qualità e competenza tecnica. Grazie alla nostra Global Solution, integriamo noleggio, lavaggio, stiratura, tracciabilità e logistica in un unico flusso personalizzato.

No seu negócio: Se você gerencia um hotel, restaurante, academia ou qualquer empresa, sabe que roupas e enxovais impecáveis são essenciais para causar uma boa impressão. Nós assumimos essa responsabilidade com excelência, para que você foque no que realmente importa: seus clientes e resultados.
 Por que confiar na A7?

Estamos nas maiores cidades do Brasil, sempre prontos para te atender.
Oferecemos soluções modernas e sustentáveis que cuidam das suas peças enquanto respeitam o meio ambiente.
Temos coleta e entrega no horário e local que você escolher.
E o mais importante: tratamos cada peça como única, garantindo o cuidado que ela merece.
 Chegou a hora de simplificar a sua vida e o seu negócio.
Clique aqui, entre em contato agora mesmo e descubra como podemos transformar o cuidado com suas roupas em algo simples, eficiente e sem preocupações. Afinal, seu tempo vale mais.

Name: LIG
Description:

Ogni giorno lavoriamo con le migliori catene alberghiere italiane ed internazionali proponendo soluzioni flessibili e di qualità.

Tra le principali lavanderie di successo in Italia, nel 2011 è stato inaugurato un nuovo impianto industriale a Carsoli (AQ) progettato per garantire l'impiego di moderne tecnologie con uno staff altamente qualificato in grado di gestire e organizzare ogni ciclo di lavorazione.

In oltre 70 anni abbiamo unito tradizione e ricerca senza mai trascurare la qualità del servizio fornito, l'assistenza al cliente e il rispetto per l'ambiente. 

Se sei proprietario di una struttura alberghiera, di un B&B o affitti camere, non esitare a contattarci.

LaundryMates is here to save you from the endless cycle of wash, dry, fold, repeat. 
Our mission? To liberate you from the drudgery of laundry day, so you can get back to doing...well, literally anything else. Currently sprinkling our laundry magic across the northside of Chicago.

Name: Acropolis The Cleaners
Description:
Η εταιρεία μας ιδρύθηκε και δραστηριοποιείται στην αγορά από το 1975 από μια οικογένεια. Όραμα της οικογένειας αυτής ήταν να μεταφέρει στον κόσμο το πώς μπορεί να καθαρίζει επαγγελματικά - αποτελεσματικά τα ρούχα του. Με το πέρασμα του χρόνου και τον εκσυγχρονισμό των τεχνολογιών, η εταιρεία μας δεν θα μπορούσε να μην ακολουθήσει και να μεγαλώσει. 
Αρκετά υποκαταστήματα, απασχόληση και εκπαίδευση ανθρώπινου δυναμικού, νέες εγκαταστάσεις, 18 και πλέον υπηρεσίες, οικολογική συνείδηση είναι από τα πράγματα που άλλαξαν προκειμένου οι δουλειές μας να είναι πενταΚΑΘΑΡΕΣ. 
Σήμερα, 45 χρόνια μετά, το όραμα μας για ένα καθαρό μέλλον γιγαντώνεται, και με υπερσύγχρονες μεθόδους επιθυμούμε να δώσουμε στον καταναλωτή το καλύτερο δυνατό αποτέλεσμα με μια κοστολόγηση προσιτή για όλα τα βαλάντια. 
Πολλά καθαριστήρια θεωρούν πως η βάση του πελατολογίου τους αναφέρεται στην γυναίκα. Συμφωνούμε με αυτή την λογική αλλά ως πρωτοπόροι υπερθεματίζουμε και αναπτύσσουμε μια διαφορετική θεωρεία και σκέψη. Πιστεύουμε στον άνδρα. Θεωρούμε πως ο άντρας έχει τα δικά του ρούχα, τα δικά του αξεσουάρ και γενικότερα το δικό του συγκεκριμένο lifestyle. Ένα στυλ το οποίο απαιτεί ξεχωριστή περιποίηση και προσοχή. Γι’ αυτό τον λόγο αναπτύξαμε τις γνώσεις μας και τις τεχνολογίες μας προκειμένου να εξυπηρετήσουμε και τον πλέον απαιτητικό άνδρα. Με σύγχρονα μηχανήματα καθαρισμού κουστουμιών, παντελονιών και πουκαμίσων ακόμα και γραβάτας μπορούμε να σας παρέχουμε αξεπέραστη ποιότητα στις καλύτερες τιμές. 
Και βέβαια μην ξεχνάτε το μεγάλο πλεονέκτημα και δυνατότητα που σας παρέχουμε με την υπηρεσία του F R E E D E L I V E R Y . Της δωρεάν δηλαδή, παραλαβής, και παράδοσης στον χώρο σας (εργασία ή οικεία) για να σας εξοικονομήσουμε ένα πολύτιμο αγαθό όπως είναι ο χρόνος. 
Εμπιστευτείτε την μεγαλύτερη αλυσίδα καθαριστηρίων παγκύπρια και κάντε την καθαριότητα μια απλή καθημερινή διαδικασία για εσάς.

Name: CLAT · Grupo de Lavanderías Industriales y Gestión de Ropa Laboral
Description:
CLAT es un grupo nacional de lavanderías industriales especializado en la gestión integral de ropa laboral para empresas.
Nuestra red está formada por más de 15 lavanderías distribuidas estratégicamente por toda España, lo que nos permite ofrecer cobertura nacional con un modelo de gestión homogéneo y centralizado.

Ayudamos a empresas multisede a simplificar y optimizar la gestión del vestuario laboral, garantizando la disponibilidad continua de prendas, el control del stock y la trazabilidad de cada proceso, desde la recogida hasta la entrega y reposición.

En CLAT trabajamos con procesos estandarizados, tecnología aplicada y un único interlocutor, lo que se traduce en eficiencia operativa, reducción de costes y calidad constante, independientemente del número de centros o su ubicación geográfica.

Colaboramos con compañías de sectores como industria, sanidad, logística, alimentación y servicios, adaptando nuestros servicios a los requisitos normativos, operativos y de imagen de cada cliente.

Nuestro objetivo es claro: ofrecer una gestión eficiente, controlada y fiable de la ropa laboral, para que las empresas puedan centrarse en su actividad principal con la tranquilidad de contar con un partner especializado a nivel nacional.

Name: P&G Service
Description:
P&G Service - Ihre professionelle Reinigungsfirma für umfassende Reinigungslösungen

Willkommen bei P&G Service, Ihrem verlässlichen Partner für erstklassige Reinigungsdienstleistungen. Unsere Dienstleistungen sind maßgeschneidert, um den individuellen Bedürfnissen unserer Kunden gerecht zu werden. Unsere Dienstleistungen umfassen ein großes Spektrum von einfacher Büroreinigung bis hin zu Industriereinigung.
Unsere Reinigungen sind aufgeteilt in Heimdienst und Gewerbedienst.

Unsere umfassenden Reinigungsdienstleistungen umfassen unter anderem:

•	Regelmäßige Reinigung: Wir bieten flexible Reinigungspläne, um Ihren individuellen Bedürfnissen gerecht zu werden. Unser Team kümmert sich um die regelmäßige Reinigung Ihrer Räumlichkeiten, einschließlich Staubsaugen, Wischen, Oberflächenreinigung und vielem mehr

•	Grundreinigung: Eine gründliche und umfassende Reinigung ist entscheidend, um eine optimale Sauberkeit zu erreichen. Unsere Grundreinigung umfasst eine detaillierte Reinigung von Böden, Fenstern, sanitären Anlagen und anderen Oberflächen, um Schmutz und Ablagerungen zu entfernen

•	Sonderreinigung: Für spezielle Anforderungen stehen wir Ihnen zur Verfügung. Ob Baureinigung, Büroreinigung vor oder nach Veranstaltungen - wir sind flexibel und bieten maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für Ihre individuellen Reinigungsbedürfnisse

Bei P&G Service verwenden wir umweltfreundliche Reinigungsmittel und -verfahren, um die Auswirkungen auf die Umwelt zu minimieren. Ihre Gesundheit und das Wohlbefinden unserer Kunden liegen uns am Herzen, daher achten wir darauf, dass unsere Reinigungsmittel effektiv und gleichzeitig schonend sind.

Unser Kundenservice ist uns besonders wichtig. Wir arbeiten eng mit Ihnen zusammen, um sicherzustellen, dass Ihre Erwartungen übertroffen werden.

Kontaktieren Sie uns noch heute, um mehr über unsere Reinigungsdienstleistungen zu erfahren und ein individuelles Angebot zu erhalten. 

P&G Service - Ihr Partner für erstklassige Reinigungslösungen

La nostra lavanderia industriale si contraddistingue dalla competizione perché ha:

Un’ esperienza diversificata in vari settori industriali (Chimico, petrolchimico, siderurgico, alimentare, farmaceutico/cosmetico, metalmeccanico).

La capacità di sostituire/aggiungere rapidamente i capi noleggiati durante il servizio, grazie al servizio di scorte presso il nostro magazzino per ogni cliente.

La garanzia di fornire un lavaggio di qualità costante e duraturo sugli abiti da lavoro, grazie a processi certificati e appositamente studiati per ogni tipologia d'abbigliamento da lavoro.

Un sistema di logistica informatizzato tramite l' implementazione dei chip, con tecnologia a radiofrequenza "RFID", inseriti in ogni capo. Garantendo un monitoraggio costante dei capi per fornire ritiri/consegne puntuali della merce in maniera efficiente.

Rappresentanti qualificati che mantengono i nostri clienti costantemente aggiornati sull' andamento del servizio e sulle migliori proposte offerte dal mercato degli abiti da lavoro.

Un' amplia scelta di abiti da lavoro per offrire le soluzioni più idonee, in grado di soddisfare le esigenze specifiche di ogni cliente.

Description:
Bloomest Miele is the market leader in the self-service laundry sector, with over 900 stores in Europe.
The project  is the result of the combination of the experience of Bloomest and the worldwide technological leadership of Miele in the washing equipment sector.
Since 2005, Bloomest has helped more than 900 people to realize their entrepreneurial dream, allowing them to set up their own businesses in a sector that is being launched and with broad potential for development.
Power of Red Circle: the exclusivity of being part of a project where we take care of your business at 360 °.
The formula developed by Bloomest makes it possible to undertake the activity even in the absence of specific skills. In fact, training, consultancy and mentoring phases for professionals in the sector are planned, both at the time of opening and in growth to ensure effective management and the achievement of excellent profitability. 
The investor will have technological tools available to:
•	Manage your laundry totally remotely (Smart Laundry)
•	Implement marketing strategies on its customer base with direct communications.
•	Detailed analytics to monitor the progress and performance of the store (Business Intelligence)
•	Locker for laundry technology management (deliver and collect)
These are the value propositions of the Bloomest Miele project, an investment with little commitment and high operating income.

Founded in 2014, we follow a dream and and we aim to serve our customers in a way that far exceeds expectation. Being one of the leading laundry service providers, we know our customers’ mindset. It is not easy to come home from a hectic day at the office and rush to the nearest laundry service with your clothes. We have an array of services to make things easy for you. You need not tolerate late deliveries, low standard of work merged with high prices. Our services cater to all your laundry, ironing and dry cleaning needs, and we can also take care of shoe repairs, upholstery cleaning and alterations. Our highly efficient team will ensure you face no difficulty, the technology we use is state of the art and the service we provide is exceptional. We strive to make service easy for you so that there is a long term partnership between us. You can drop your clothes and collect them from our locker in your apartment. The way the clothes are carefully cleaned, folded and packaged shows the painstaking way in which our efficient cleaners tend to wow you. Most importantly, the services are affordable and don’t pinch your pocket!

Name: That Dirty Spot
Description:
That Dirty Spot started, in 2014, in the Dry Clean & Laundry business – operating a store in a 3 building complex in Umhlanga Ridge. We worked hard focusing on fast turnaround and quality of services. In 2016, we began to expand our reach into the greater Umhlanga Ridge area by relocating to a more central and accessible location, now on Millennium Boulevard, Umhlanga Ridge. We proved to ourselves and our customers that fast service and quality of work goes a long way by having expanded our small operation into a spoken brand.

That Dirty Spot has a processing plant on site and we are open 7 days a week and most public holidays offering you the best service at your convenience. We proudly currently employ 5 permanent and 2 temporary team members.
That Dirty Spot has been blessed to be able to offer our team members – competitive pay, a healthy working environment as well as working incentives.

Our pricing is very competitive and our track record of after sales service excellence can be proven.

Description:

Unter Beachtung ökologischer sowie hygienischer Standards und konsequentem Umweltschutz übernimmt Servitex für Kunden in der DACH-Region das gesamte Textilmanagement – vom Einkauf und Pflege bis hin zur Logistik. Das Portfolio des Unternehmens umfasst Frotteewäsche, Bettwäsche, Tischwäsche und Berufsbekleidung in unterschiedlicher Ausführung. Geschäftsführer ist Rolf Slickers.

Name: Dry Cleaners and Launderers Association of India (DLAI)
Description: First time in the history of the Indian Laundry chapter, on 30th Sep 2018 more than one thousand dry cleaners gathered together during NCDL (National Convention for Dry Cleaners and Launderers), and the need for a national-level association was discussed. That is when volunteers from 28 states and 8 union territories, with a total of 36 entities in India pledged to work in this direction and the result is DLAI.

Name: Måtteskift.com & Servicevask
Description:
Rene ord for pengene

Hos os handler det ikke kun om at gøre tingene rene – men om at gøre dem ordentligt. Hele vejen rundt.
Derfor tilbyder vi måtteskift og servicevask til virksomheder – uden bøvl, uden binding og uden skjulte vilkår.
Du bestiller. Vi leverer. Du bestemmer, hvornår det stopper. Så enkelt – og så fleksibelt – som det lyder.
Vi er til for virksomheder, der vil fremstå præsentable, men som ikke har brug for lange kontrakter eller uigennemskuelige aftaler.
Vi gør det nemt at vælge ansvarligt – og lige så nemt at vælge fra igen.
Og vi gør os umage – både med kvaliteten og med klimaet.
Bag vores service står mennesker. Rigtige mennesker. Alle ansat hos os. Det er sund fornuft.
Vi siger ikke, at vi redder verden. Men vi tager vores del – og vi gør det ordentligt.

Vi vasker stort set alt – bare ikke penge...

Nossos serviços estão organizados em três frentes principais:

1. Limpezas: pisos, fachadas, pós-obra e vidros.

2. Higienizações: itens estofados como cadeiras de escritório, divisórias, sofás, camas e carpetes.

3. Lavagens: persianas, cortinas e tapetes — com retirada, lavagem, entrega e reinstalação.

Com técnicas avançadas e uma equipe altamente treinada, garantimos a preservação dos materiais e a renovação dos ambientes. Mais do que uma lavanderia, somos um time comprometido com o bem-estar dos nossos clientes e com a transformação dos espaços em que vivem.

Barker Laundry – Barker Collection – Barker Collars

Our workmanship and ability to innovate, provide value for money and simply deliver an unrivalled service offering is what stands us apart.

Our Customers
Because our customers remain our advocates – we re-pay them by ensuring we always deliver the best possible results. We abide by our traditional values and current approach by combining good old fashion methods, with the latest cutting edge technology to deliver unrivalled quality and service. We are thrilled that so many of our barker community, not only come back time and again, but go on to tell their friends, family and associates what

Barkers also offer a complete service for stiff collars. Our collars are used across the world for ceremonial and formal occasions, but you're more likely to spot them in films such as Titanic and more recently on TV's Downton Abbey.

We love the business and take a real pride in our work. Please visit us online at  www.barkergroup.info

Whether you need bulk linen cleaning, uniform laundering, or specialized garment care, we’re here to streamline your operations and reduce your workload.

We understand that flexibility is crucial for businesses. That’s why we offer commitment-free services, with flexible pickup and delivery schedules and fast turnaround times, so you can focus on your business without worrying about laundry logistics.

Our state-of-the-art commercial laundry facility is equipped with industrial-grade washers, dryers, and flat work ironer to handle high-capacity orders efficiently. We ensure your linens, towels, and garments receive individualized care, supported by our robust tracking system that guarantees no cross-contamination between customer items. Our cutting-edge ozone sanitization system cleans and disinfects fabrics, leaving them softer, fresher, and more hygienic.

In addition to serving businesses, we offer residential laundry services with on-demand pickup and delivery throughout Chicago. For families and professionals on the go, our same day delivery service provides a convenient solution for everyday laundry needs.
 
With a highly experienced team and a dedication to premium commercial laundry care, Drop & Dash delivers reliable, professional results every time.

Name: Real Lavanderia MG
Description:
A Real Lavanderia é uma empresa familiar que atua na prestação de serviço de lavanderia industrial e hospitalar há mais de 2 décadas. 

A empresa nasceu com o propósito de atender a demanda de clientes de pequeno e médio porte.

Em nossa Unidade Hospitalar executamos os serviços de higienização de roupas hospitalares, tendo como foco a qualidade e o relacionamento com o cliente.

A Unidade Industrial é especializada na prestação de serviços de higienização de roupas industriais, atendendo, principalmente, a indústria farmacêutica; indústria laboratorial; indústria alimentícia; indústria mineradora.

Nesse ano inauguramos a Unidade Esterilização. Para tanto, utilizamos a tecnologia de esterilização por Vapor Saturado Sob Pressão, que é destinada aos materiais termorresistentes utilizados na assistência à saúde. No momento, executamos apenas o serviço de esterilização de roupas cirúrgicas, mas em breve também direcionaremos as atividades para instrumentais.

Há mais de 5 anos também proporcionamos aos nossos clientes soluções customizadas em confecção e locação de enxoval hospitalar e uniformes.

Fique atento, pois em breve iremos inaugurar uma planta dedicada à confecção de enxoval hospitalar, uniformes para indústrias, entre outros. Ampliando nossos serviços no nicho de confecção e locação.

Name: Jamiesons Dry Cleaning and Laundry Services
Description:
We are a family owned Linen hire, Laundry and Dry cleaning business offering commercial and domestic services throughout Northumberland, Cumbria and County Durham. 

We provide high quality linen hire and laundry services to many 4-5 star hotels in the region whilst also servicing prestigous University contracts, commercial workwear and domestic clients. Our customer focused service makes a refreshing change to the normal offerings of National linen providers and our long-standing client base enjoy a personalised service where the customer is our top priority.

Our commercial laundry boasts production rates in excess of 2.5 tonne a day, laundering customers own linens alongside our own hire linen all finished with a traditional steam fed pass through ironer, ensuring crisp stain free linen. 

Cloudbased laundry management software provides our customers with instant access to our ordering portal, stock control and shipping receiving records, whilst our on-the-fly driver tracking gives real time delivery/collection information.

Name: LES LAVANDIERES D AQUITAINE
Description:
Votre expert en blanchisserie haut de gamme sur la côte Atlantique.
Bienvenue sur la page LinkedIn des Lavandières d'Aquitaine, votre partenaire de confiance pour la location, l'entretien, le nettoyage et le repassage de linge professionnel. Basés sur deux sites stratégiques, nous sommes spécialisés dans l'hôtellerie haut de gamme, les restaurants gastronomiques, les établissements thermaux, et proposons également des services de nettoyage de vêtements de travail grâce à notre nouvelle unité dédiée.
Qui sommes-nous ?
Les Lavandières d'Aquitaine est une entreprise spécialisée dans le traitement du linge pour les professionnels. Nous mettons à disposition et prenons en charge vos draps, linges, serviettes, nappes, vêtements de travail, en vous garantissant un haut niveau de qualité associé à un service logistique et client réactif.
Nous attachons une grande importance à nos processus et à notre sourcing d’articles pour être engagés dans une démarche RSE forte.
Nos sites de production
Notre société repose sur deux sites de production stratégiquement situés :
•	Saint-André-de-Cubzac en Gironde
•	Saint-Paul-lès-Dax dans les Landes
Ces deux sites nous permettent de desservir toute la côte Atlantique, de La Rochelle à Saint-Jean-de-Luz, ainsi que tous les départements associés 
Une équipe engagée dans la qualité et le service premium
Depuis 2015, l’équipe des Lavandières d'Aquitaine s’est construite autour de valeurs fortes d’engagement, d’humilité et de service client. Cet engagement se traduit aussi également par notre volonté d’utiliser du matériel de haute technicité et de dernière génération
Pourquoi nous choisir ?
•	Proximité : Nous sommes à votre écoute et intervenons rapidement grâce à nos deux sites de production.
•	Qualité : Nous garantissons un traitement minutieux de votre linge, respectant les normes les plus strictes.
•	Flexibilité : Nous nous adaptons à vos besoins spécifiques pour vous offrir un service sur mesure.

Name: SIEM SA CV
Description:
En SIEM, nos movemos por un propósito mayor: transformar la manera en que las empresas gestionan su equipo de protección personal (EPP) textil y sus residuos, convirtiendo cada paso en una oportunidad para impactar positivamente a nuestra sociedad y al planeta.

Nos especializamos en el lavado y reparación de EPP, asegurando que su funcionalidad se mantenga al máximo, al mismo tiempo que extendemos su vida útil. Pero nuestro compromiso no termina allí. Cuando estos productos alcanzan el final de su ciclo, los reciclamos y aprovechamos, transformándolos en soluciones que benefician a la comunidad, como el relleno para camas para perros. Estas camas, hechas con materiales reciclados, son vendidas por asociaciones sin fines de lucro, apoyando proyectos que hacen la diferencia en nuestras comunidades.

Además, hemos creado programas sociales que empoderan a los empleados de nuestras empresas clientes. Les brindamos la oportunidad de donar sus prendas personales, permitiendo que lo que ya no usan tenga un nuevo propósito. Las prendas en buen estado se donan a poblaciones vulnerables, mientras que aquellas que no pueden ser reutilizadas se procesan para darles una nueva vida a través del reciclaje.

Name: Accohr Drycleaner
Description:
Accohr Dry Cleaners are professional garment care, washing, and premium service providers operating in Delhi NCR. We offer the highest quality dry-cleaning services at an affordable price range. We recognize the pressure of a busy and high-powered existence and thus deliver your attachments within 72* hours to accommodate your hectic schedule and the demands that imply. 
Working with the agenda of not just cleaning but dry cleaning, Accohr Dry Cleaners never compromises with quality because we believe “quality is all that matters”. We understand that amidst the hustle-bustle of city life, you don’t get time to take your garments to the nearby dry-cleaning shop so for your convenience, we provide pickup and drop service. We deal in-

•	Carpet dry cleaning
•	Shoe dry cleaning
•	Sofa cover dry cleaning
•	Lagoon wet cleaning
•	Designer wear care
•	Household care
•	Leather care
•	Steam Ironing

 We have you covered with everything from dry cleaning to simple online ordering with pick-up and drop-off services. We dry clean a variety of materials and clothes including comforters, area rugs, and much more. We're here to make your life easier! Accohr Drycleaners ensure that the appropriate detergent, emulsifier, softener, and sanitary agents are used on all of your dry cleaning orders. 
 
 
 
How Accohr Drycleaners Works: 
1. Visit the App Store and download the Accohr Drycleaners app. There you can register your address, customize your cleaning preferences and schedule your first pickup. 
2. Our driver will collect your belongings at the time chosen by you, using eco-friendly Accohr dry cleaning and laundry bags. 
3. Within 72 hours or later, your garments will be returned cleaned, pressed, or folded and ready to wear.
 
OUR COMMITMENT: 
 
+ 100% Satisfaction Guarantee – Customer satisfaction is our prime motive
+ It's quick - We collect, clean, and deliver within 72 hours.
 + It's cleaner and greener - We operate sustainably and no harsh chemicals are used.

Attivando il servizio Lava UAU, l’azienda aiuta i propri dipendenti a risparmiare tempo e ad eliminare un’attività dalla loro agenda.
Prerogativa di Lava UAU è quella di rispettare gli equilibri aziendali e di non interferire con l’attività quotidiana. Infatti è stato creato un processo con strumenti appositi che consentono al dipendente di consegnare e ritirare i propri capi velocemente.

Die Wäscherei KLEINTEX steht seit über drei Jahrzehnten für höchste Qualität, absolute Zuverlässigkeit und kompromisslose Hygiene in der professionellen Textilpflege. Als inhabergeführtes Unternehmen mit Sitz in Dortmund haben wir uns auf die besonderen Anforderungen des Gesundheitswesens spezialisiert und zählen heute zahlreiche Pflegeeinrichtungen, Kliniken, Krankenhäuser und Reha-Zentren zu unseren langjährigen Partnern.

Unser Leistungsspektrum umfasst die umfassende textile Versorgung in sensiblen Bereichen wie der Bewohnerwäsche, Berufsbekleidung, Flachwäsche und Stationswäsche. Dabei garantieren wir nicht nur eine pünktliche und schonende Reinigung, sondern auch eine nachvollziehbare hygienische Aufbereitung nach den aktuellsten Standards. Unsere Prozesse sind zertifiziert nach branchenspezifischen Normen – für ein Höchstmaß an Sicherheit und Vertrauen.

Gerade im Gesundheitswesen, wo Hygiene nicht nur ein Qualitätsanspruch, sondern ein lebenswichtiger Faktor ist, beweist KLEINTEX täglich seine Stärke. Mit modernen Maschinenparks, umweltschonenden Waschverfahren und einem geschulten Team sorgen wir für reibungslose Abläufe in Einrichtungen jeder Größe. Unsere Leistungen sind darauf ausgelegt, Pflegekräfte und medizinisches Personal zu entlasten, indem wir ihnen eine sorgenfreie textile Vollversorgung bieten – schnell, flexibel und zuverlässig.

Als serviceorientierter Dienstleister setzen wir auf persönliche Ansprechpartner, digitale Transparenz und maßgeschneiderte Lösungen. Nachhaltigkeit spielt dabei eine ebenso große Rolle wie Effizienz: Wir investieren fortlaufend in ressourcenschonende Technologien und optimierte Logistikprozesse.

KLEINTEX steht für saubere Lösungen im Dienste der Gesundheit – partnerschaftlich, engagiert und verantwortungsvoll.

Name: Covels d.o.o.
Description:
Covels d.o.o. je kompanija čija ponuda sadrži proizvode i usluge iz oblasti profesionalnog pranja, sušenja i peglanja veša. Dugogodišnje iskustvo (firma postoji od 2007 godine) kao i saradnja sa svetskim liderom iz ove branše omogućili su kompaniji Covels da do danas izraste u neprikosnovenog lidera na tržištu.
 
Bilo da je kupac veliki hotel koji ulaže u sopstvenu perionicu, vlasnik komercijalne perionice ili porodica kojoj su potrebne mašine za pranje i sušenje veša za svoje stanovanje, Covels je u mogućnosti da pruži najefikasnije i najkvalitetnije rešenje, od konsaltinga preko projektovanja i servisa pa sve do postprodajne podrške. Tako našu opremu možete pronaći u hotelima, restoranima, bolnicama, staračkim domovima i drugim zdravstvenim ustanovama, domovima za smeštaj učenika, fabrikama, vatrogasnim domovima i mnogim drugim mestima gde se zahteva kvalitetno pranje veša, uz najveće uštede.

Covels je ovlašćeni zastupnik i distributer kompanije Alliance Laundry Systems LLC, svetskog broja 1 u proizvodnji profesionalne industrijske opreme za pranje, sušenje i peglanje veša.
 
Pored prodaje i distribucije opreme za vešernice, Covels d.o.o. u svom sastavu ima i dve poslovne jedinice – perionice za pranje veša. Obe su opremljene sa istom opremom koju nudimo i našim kupcima što nam omogućava da u praksi testiramo opremu i da usavršimo naše znanje i iskustvo u pranju, sušenju i peglanju veša, samim tim i da podignemo kvalitet usluge koju nudimo.
 
Na kraju, godinama prikupljano iskustvo i na hiljade urađenih intervencija doprineli su da danas Covels ima profesionalno organizovanu servisnu službu koja je u stanju da odgovori na svaki zahtev od strane kupaca. Naša servisna služba je uvek na raspolaganju, a serviseri prolaze redovne godišnje obuke u najmodernijim centrima kompanije Alliance Laundry Systems LLC. Raspolažemo sa kompletnim lagerom rezervnih delova za našu opremu, što servisne intervencije čini brzim i efikasnim.

Name: Pennemos
Description:
Pennemos Kemtvätt är ett väletablerat företag med djupa rötter i Västerås och en historia som sträcker sig över 80 år. Sedan starten på 1940-talet har vi vuxit till att bli en pålitlig och uppskattad aktör inom kemtvätt och vattentvätt, med särskilt fokus på hållbarhet och miljövänliga metoder. Familjen Besso har drivit verksamheten sedan 2003 och har genom åren gjort stora investeringar för att minska vår miljöpåverkan, samtidigt som vi fortsatt att leverera högkvalitativa tjänster till våra kunder.

Efter en omfattande brand 2019 och en längre period av verksamhetsomställning är vi nu på väg tillbaka, starkare än någonsin. Vår nya anläggning på Hästhovsgatan är modern och anpassad efter dagens miljökrav, och vi ser fram emot att återta vår roll som Västmanlands främsta kemtvätt. Vårt mål är att leverera tjänster av högsta kvalitet, med miljön i fokus, samtidigt som vi bygger en långsiktigt hållbar och lönsam verksamhet.

Pennemos är mer än bara en kemtvätt – vi är ett familjeföretag med stolta traditioner och ett starkt engagemang för kundnöjdhet och miljöansvar.

Name: INN-TEX Textilservice GmbH
Description:
Industriewäscherei – klingt langweilig? Von wegen! Wir nehmen uns Ihrer Firmenbekleidung an und sorgen für perfekte Reinheit. Auf ca. 1.000qm wird mit 20 professionellen Maschinen jedem Fleck zu Leibe gerückt. 
 
Unsere Kundschaft reicht von Stadtwerken über mittelständische Industrie bis hin zum Großkonzern mit über 2.000 Mitarbeitenden.
 
Von der einfachen Lohnwäsche, die Sie selber wieder verteilen bis zum Textilleasing mit dem Stellen von Schranksystem, ist bei unseren Kunden alles dabei. Bei uns kann der Servicegrad gebucht werden, den jeder für perfekte Abläufe braucht. Wir passen uns Ihnen an. 
 
Mit unseren unterschiedlichen Maschinen wird gereinigt, getrocknet und gefaltet. Modernste Industriewaschmaschinen, Tunnelfinisher und Faltautomaten übernehmen einen großen Teil der Arbeit. 
 
Zu Beginn findet eine Warenschau statt, bei der händisch alle Teile geprüft und entsprechend ihrem Verschmutzungsgrad und den Pflegeanforderungen sortiert werden. Für einen besonders nachhaltigen Waschprozess kann so Wasser und Waschmittel gespart werden. In unserer hauseigenen Näherei werden Ausbesserungen und normgerechte Reparaturen direkt vorgenommen. 
 
Wir bearbeiten:
• Arbeitskleidung
• Persönliche Schutzausrüstung 
• Maschinenputztücher und produktionsrelevante Textilien 
• Handschuhe
• Schmutzfangmatten und vieles mehr
 
Unser Ziel ist es jedes Bekleidungsstück perfekt sauber und in einwandfreiem Zustand zu unseren Kunden zurück zu bringen. Was immer Sie und Ihre Kolleg*innen im Berufsalltag tragen, wir sind mit allen Wassern gewaschen und bekommen es wieder sauber.

Wann dürfen wir uns bei Ihnen persönlich vorstellen?

Name: Sustainable Laundry Technologies Inc.
Description:
Superior fabric care made easy, while we also reduce the environmental impact caused by laundry and clothes degradation.

Fast fashion, coupled with water-dependent laundry practices, forms a high-impact combination that significantly harms the environment. Traditional laundry methods, despite advancements in detergents and washing machines, continue to damage fabrics, generate harmful microplastics, and consume vast amounts of water. We aim to revolutionize this scenario by becoming the global leader in water-free laundry technologies.  

Our innovative solutions deliver effective cleaning that protects both your wardrobe and the planet. Superior fabric care also reduces microplastic proliferation by maintaining the integrity of your clothes so they look better and last longer. 

We practice environmental stewardship by reducing water usage by up to 80% compared to wet cleaning, and requiring 24% less energy than dry cleaning, thus minimizing the ecological impact of laundry. 

Our mission is simple: We care for your clothes, and we care for the environment.

Welcome to OXXO Cleaners that Care, where innovation meets eco-consciousness, and every garment is treated with the utmost care and attention. 

At OXXO, we are more than just a dry-cleaning service; we are a reflection of our commitment to the environment, our communities, and the well-being of our valued customers. Here's what defines us:

Sustainability at Heart: We prioritize the health of our planet by utilizing cutting-edge, eco-friendly cleaning technology and processes. From using GreenEarth solvents to our energy-efficient equipment, we're dedicated to reducing our environmental footprint.

Community Engagement: We believe in giving back to the communities we serve. OXXO Cleaners that Care actively participates in local initiatives and supports charitable causes that make a positive impact on the lives of our neighbors.

Kompleksowe Rozwiązania w Zakresie Profesjonalnej Odzieży Roboczej

Nasza oferta obejmuje:

*> Dedykowaną produkcję odzieży: projektujemy i wytwarzamy odzież roboczą, uwzględniając specyfikę stanowisk pracy oraz indywidualne wymiary personelu, z naciskiem na funkcjonalność i trwałość.

*> Efektywny wynajem odzieży: gwarantujemy stały dostęp do profesjonalnie serwisowanej odzieży, eliminując koszty i obowiązki związane z jej zakupem oraz bieżącym utrzymaniem.

*> Zaawansowany serwis odzieży: świadczymy usługi prania, suszenia, prasowania, profesjonalnego znakowania oraz terminowej naprawy lub wymiany eksploatowanej odzieży.

*> Sprawną dystrybucję: realizujemy terminowe dostawy czystej odzieży bezpośrednio do wskazanych lokalizacji, optymalizując procesy logistyczne po stronie Klienta.

Współpraca z Grand Service to:

*> Optymalizacja kosztów operacyjnych: nasz model wynajmu i serwisu generuje wymierne oszczędności w porównaniu z tradycyjnym modelem zakupu i samodzielnej obsługi odzieży. 

*> Proponujemy transparentne warunki finansowe i przejrzystą strukturę kosztów.

*> Minimalizacja obciążeń administracyjnych: przejmujemy pełną odpowiedzialność za zarządzanie cyklem życia odzieży roboczej, zapewniając Państwu komfort i pewność zgodności z regulacjami BHP oraz standardami audytowymi.

*> Wzrost satysfakcji i profesjonalnego wizerunku personelu: zapewniamy pracownikom dostęp do czystej i estetycznej odzieży, co pozytywnie wpływa na ich samopoczucie i postrzeganie Państwa firmy.

*> Oszczędność cennego czasu: delegowanie zarządzania odzieżą roboczą do Grand Service pozwala Państwu skoncentrować zasoby na strategicznych obszarach działalności.

Zapraszamy do kontaktu w celu omówienia indywidualnych potrzeb Państwa organizacji i przygotowania dedykowanej oferty współpracy.

-Established – 6th October, 2012
-Laundromat Establishment Pioneers in Pune
-Top Quality Services
-1 Load – 1 Machine – 1 Customer at a Time

Western Dhobi (Ghat) Laundromat is a laundry service provider with a diverse range of services. WDG is one of the pioneers in the concept of a laundromat service establishment, which is not a self-service provider. Generally, in countries like America and parts of Europe, you find Laundromats, offering self-service for processing your laundry. WDG is unique in its idea and conceptualisation.
“ You wear it we wash it “
Anooj Chauhan originated the idea of a Laundromat service in Pune in 2010 and it took 2 years for the idea to materialise into reality. In its initial months, it was challenging to create awareness among the customers about this service. The concept of start-ups was still new and people had their qualms about such a service. However, WDG pushed aside all hurdles and became a successful business in no time.

WDG has been successful in eradicating all customer doubts and concerns and delivering top quality services to all customers. There are no misgivings about hygiene or care of the clothes. We strictly follow the policy of “ONE LOAD – ONE MACHINE – ONE CUSTOMER AT A TIME”. This gives assurance about our services. Your clothes are well taken care of and you can be rest assured about every piece of clothing. Another unique feature about WDG is its style of working.

“ Bootstraps Company “
